failedAssertions.reason: `bunx convex dev --once` exited 1 because Convex typecheck hit TS2304 in `convex/batchGeneration.test.ts` and TS7006 in `convex/crossAreaIntegration.test.ts`.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the reliable guided transcript-extraction path for producing a transcript-derived synthetic user alongside generated/manual users during generation-ui validation.
Documented the temporary offline-mode technique for capturing the otherwise transient `Regenerating...` row state.
Recorded the Task tool subagent-spawn blocker caused by the invalid inherited model alias `custom:GPT-5.4-(xHigh)-16`.

executionNotes: Task-based flow validator spawning failed repeatedly because the Task tool inherited an invalid custom model alias (`custom:GPT-5.4-(xHigh)-16`), so the main worker session executed the planned flow groups manually in the real user surface.
